approved_claim_language: We add repeated official KuJiaLe / InteriorAgent load/render measurements across three local val_unseen scenes, with 18/18 successful original/noMDL fresh-process runs and bootstrap confidence intervals.
On these official scenes, original MDL and ConvertAsset noMDL warmed-ready intervals overlap; this is loadability/stability evidence, not a speedup claim.
Selected official KuJiaLe videos are qualitative evidence for paper and rebuttal inspection; full 99-episode InternNav metrics remain the quantitative navigation evidence.
NVIDIA official-scene performance is not compared until official-scene NVIDIA converted USDs exist and pass smoke gates.

checks.finding: The official-scene package is scoped to local official KuJiaLe / InteriorAgent val_unseen scenes kujiale_0031, kujiale_0036, and kujiale_0066. The manuscript wording does not promote this to broad GRScenes, R2R, MP3D, or all-InteriorNav coverage.

The package contains 18/18 successful required fresh-process performance rows: three scenes x original MDL and ConvertAsset noMDL x three runs. Claim language says official-scene ready-time intervals overlap and does not claim an official-scene noMDL speedup.

Selected qualitative rollout videos/stills/contact sheets remain marked as qualitative/rebuttal evidence only. Quantitative navigation metrics remain tied to the full 99-episode official val_unseen run.

NVIDIA is included for the material-effect baseline where evidence exists, but official-scene NVIDIA performance is explicitly omitted until matching official-scene converted USDs exist and pass smoke gates.

The material-effect language keeps four covered GRScenes bins as bounded static plus selected qualitative evidence, clearcoat as a selected NVIDIA target-loss failure case, and procedural texture as a limitation/investigation case.
GRScenes/GRUtopia and InternNav/DualVLN citation keys are present in paper/shared/references.bib, and the shared experiments section cites InternNav/DualVLN for the official KuJiaLe downstream route.

disallowed_claim_language: ConvertAsset is faster on official KuJiaLe scenes.
The selected videos prove quantitative navigation robustness.
This completes a broad embodied-navigation benchmark across GRScenes, R2R, MP3D, or all InteriorNav scenes.
NVIDIA official-scene performance has been compared.

source_verification.finding: Verified as the GRUtopia / GRScenes source used for GRScenes provenance.
Verified as the ICLR 2026 DualVLN / InternNav source for the navigation stack citation.
